message.content:
{
  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of a YORK YEAS screw-type air-source heat pump unit installation, operation, and maintenance manual. It features the company logo, manual title, form number, a photograph of the unit, and a safety warning about refrigerant pressure.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "logo", "label": "YORK logo"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Manual title and form number"},
    {"type": "photograph", "label": "YEAS heat pump unit"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Safety warning"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["equipment_identification", "manual_documentation", "safety_warnings"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "YORK A JOHNSON CONTROLS COMPANY YEAS 螺杆式空气源热泵机组 安装、操作和维护手册 替代：无 FORM NO.: AP1203-IOM02 (0606) 机组型号 YEAS (设计序列号B) 警告 系统内充注了一定压力的制冷剂 对系统进行维护时，如果操作程序不正确，可能严重损伤系统，所有维护工作必须由约克维修技术人员按照约克的安装操作维护手册来进行。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page is a cover page, not a technical diagram or table. The relationships between visual entities are primarily layout-based (e.g., logo above title) and not functional or technical connections suitable for the 'visual_relationships' field.",
  "confidence": 1.0
}
